candidate.targetRole: Technical Expert / Senior Engineer — Hydrogen electrochemical systems + Energy Digitalization: LT-PEM fuel cell / PEM electrolyzer, durability & degradation, model-based engineering, digital twin / PHM, condition monitoring, lifetime prediction, test data systems, parameter identification, AST & validation methodology; plus transferable roles in battery/ESS/powertrain reliability
